description_long: This bungalow features a broad, flat roof that extends well beyond the main structure, providing ample shade to the wraparound wooden porch. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral tone, contrasting with the warm wooden deck and railings that encircle much of the building. Large windows are present on the front facade, allowing natural light to flood the interior, while the side and rear walls have fewer and smaller windows for privacy. The building sits on a rectangular grassy plot, with a set of steps leading up to the porch. The overall design is modern and minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on horizontal elements. The property includes a small paved area adjacent to the house, possibly for access or utility purposes.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a wide flat roof, wraparound wooden porch, and large front windows, set on a grassy plot. The design emphasizes clean lines and horizontal elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, large central window, and main entrance area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the extended porch, smaller windows, and a paved area adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Side view with minimal windows and a clear view of the roof's overhang and porch railing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the long stretch of porch and additional windows along the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front window and smaller side windows
